message:
fix: use cross-filesystem safe move in MigrateRigFromBeads (gt-cpqxa)

os.Rename fails with EXDEV when source and target are on different
filesystems. Add moveDir helper that tries rename first, then falls
back to cp -a + RemoveAll for cross-filesystem moves.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
